seoTitle: Bethel vs Beulah Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bethel and Beulah Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bethel vs Beulah Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bethel and Beulah Park.
heading: Bethel vs Beulah Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bethel, South Australia and Beulah Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bethel has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Beulah Park (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bethel or Beulah Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bethel has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Beulah Park scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bethel scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Beulah Park scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bethel or Beulah Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bethel has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
